revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初五]][[zh:十一月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840230]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 5|qq=November 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 16th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:797|797]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was appointed as {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} for the subjugation of the Ezo lands. * [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – Due to a celestial earthquake, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tennpuku (Japan)|ja|天福|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpuku (Japan)|1=Tennpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} to [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]） – During the 【Ansei great earthquake】 (安政の大Earthquake / {{ill|Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja|安政南海Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), a massive tsunami caused 80,000 households to be swept away with over 3,000 fatalities. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]） – [[:en:Yoshida Shōin|Yoshida Shōin]] opened the [[:en:Shōkasonjuku Academy|Matsushita Sonjuku]].
== Births == * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1432|1432]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Shimazu Tadatoki|ja|島津立久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Tadatoki|1=Shimazu Tatsuhisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11245262}}, a regional warlord (守護大名) of the Shimazu clan (died [[:en:1474|1474]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – [[:en:Satake Yoshiharu|Satake Yoshiaki]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1758|1758]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]） – {{ill|Ii Naotaka|ja|井伊直暉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naotaka|1=Ii Naoteru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161312}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1826|1826]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Terutoku|ja|松平輝徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Terutoku|1=Matsudaira Teruakira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530597}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1840|1840]]). * Bunsei 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1827|1827]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]） – [[:en:Saisho Atsushi|Zeisho Atsu]], a samurai and bureaucrat (died [[:en:1910|1910]]). * Bunsei 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]） – [[:en:Sakakibara Kenkichi|Sakakibara Kanekichi]], a retainer (幕臣) and practitioner of [[:en:Kenjutsu|Kenjutsu]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|4|11|6|10|5|12|11|1105|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初五]][[zh:十一月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840230]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 5|qq=November 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 16th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:797|797]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was appointed as {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} for the subjugation of the Ezo lands. * [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – Due to a celestial earthquake, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tennpuku (Japan)|ja|天福|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpuku (Japan)|1=Tennpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} to [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]） – During the 【Ansei great earthquake】 (安政の大Earthquake / {{ill|Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja|安政南海Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), a massive tsunami caused 80,000 households to be swept away with over 3,000 fatalities. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]） – [[:en:Yoshida Shōin|Yoshida Shōin]] opened the [[:en:Shōkasonjuku Academy|Matsushita Sonjuku]].
== Births == * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1432|1432]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Shimazu Tadatoki|ja|島津立久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Tadatoki|1=Shimazu Tatsuhisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11245262}}, a regional warlord (守護大名) of the Shimazu clan (died [[:en:1474|1474]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – [[:en:Satake Yoshiharu|Satake Yoshiaki]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1758|1758]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]） – {{ill|Ii Naotaka|ja|井伊直暉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naotaka|1=Ii Naoteru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161312}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1826|1826]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Terutoku|ja|松平輝徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Terutoku|1=Matsudaira Teruakira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530597}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1840|1840]]). * Bunsei 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1827|1827]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]） – [[:en:Saisho Atsushi|Zeisho Atsu]], a samurai and bureaucrat (died [[:en:1910|1910]]). * Bunsei 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]） – [[:en:Sakakibara Kenkichi|Sakakibara Kanekichi]], a retainer (幕臣) and practitioner of [[:en:Kenjutsu|Kenjutsu]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

== Births == * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1432|1432]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Shimazu Tadatoki|ja|島津立久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Tadatoki|1=Shimazu Tatsuhisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11245262}}, a regional warlord (守護大名) of the Shimazu clan (died [[:en:1474|1474]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – [[:en:Satake Yoshiharu|Satake Yoshiaki]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1758|1758]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]） – {{ill|Ii Naotaka|ja|井伊直暉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naotaka|1=Ii Naoteru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161312}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1826|1826]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Terutoku|ja|松平輝徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Terutoku|1=Matsudaira Teruakira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530597}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1840|1840]]). * Bunsei 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1827|1827]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]） – [[:en:Saisho Atsushi|Zeisho Atsu]], a samurai and bureaucrat (died [[:en:1910|1910]]). * Bunsei 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]） – [[:en:Sakakibara Kenkichi|Sakakibara Kanekichi]], a retainer (幕臣) and practitioner of [[:en:Kenjutsu|Kenjutsu]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|4|11|6|10|5|12|11|1105|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 16th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:797|797]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was appointed as {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} for the subjugation of the Ezo lands. * [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – Due to a celestial earthquake, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tennpuku (Japan)|ja|天福|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpuku (Japan)|1=Tennpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} to [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]） – During the 【Ansei great earthquake】 (安政の大Earthquake / {{ill|Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja|安政南海Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), a massive tsunami caused 80,000 households to be swept away with over 3,000 fatalities. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]） – [[:en:Yoshida Shōin|Yoshida Shōin]] opened the [[:en:Shōkasonjuku Academy|Matsushita Sonjuku]].
== Births == * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1432|1432]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Shimazu Tadatoki|ja|島津立久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Tadatoki|1=Shimazu Tatsuhisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11245262}}, a regional warlord (守護大名) of the Shimazu clan (died [[:en:1474|1474]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – [[:en:Satake Yoshiharu|Satake Yoshiaki]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1758|1758]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]） – {{ill|Ii Naotaka|ja|井伊直暉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naotaka|1=Ii Naoteru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161312}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1826|1826]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Terutoku|ja|松平輝徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Terutoku|1=Matsudaira Teruakira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530597}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1840|1840]]). * Bunsei 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1827|1827]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]） – [[:en:Saisho Atsushi|Zeisho Atsu]], a samurai and bureaucrat (died [[:en:1910|1910]]). * Bunsei 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]） – [[:en:Sakakibara Kenkichi|Sakakibara Kanekichi]], a retainer (幕臣) and practitioner of [[:en:Kenjutsu|Kenjutsu]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|4|11|6|10|5|12|11|1105|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 5일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初五]][[zh:十一月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 5일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初五]][[zh:十一月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初五]][[zh:十一月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840230]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 5|qq=November 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 16th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:797|797]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was appointed as {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} for the subjugation of the Ezo lands. * [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – Due to a celestial earthquake, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tennpuku (Japan)|ja|天福|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpuku (Japan)|1=Tennpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} to [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]） – During the 【Ansei great earthquake】 (安政の大Earthquake / {{ill|Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja|安政南海Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), a massive tsunami caused 80,000 households to be swept away with over 3,000 fatalities. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]） – [[:en:Yoshida Shōin|Yoshida Shōin]] opened the [[:en:Shōkasonjuku Academy|Matsushita Sonjuku]].
== Births == * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1432|1432]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Shimazu Tadatoki|ja|島津立久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Tadatoki|1=Shimazu Tatsuhisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11245262}}, a regional warlord (守護大名) of the Shimazu clan (died [[:en:1474|1474]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – [[:en:Satake Yoshiharu|Satake Yoshiaki]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1758|1758]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]） – {{ill|Ii Naotaka|ja|井伊直暉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naotaka|1=Ii Naoteru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161312}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1826|1826]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Terutoku|ja|松平輝徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Terutoku|1=Matsudaira Teruakira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530597}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1840|1840]]). * Bunsei 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1827|1827]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]） – [[:en:Saisho Atsushi|Zeisho Atsu]], a samurai and bureaucrat (died [[:en:1910|1910]]). * Bunsei 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]） – [[:en:Sakakibara Kenkichi|Sakakibara Kanekichi]], a retainer (幕臣) and practitioner of [[:en:Kenjutsu|Kenjutsu]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 16th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:797|797]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was appointed as {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} for the subjugation of the Ezo lands. * [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – Due to a celestial earthquake, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tennpuku (Japan)|ja|天福|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpuku (Japan)|1=Tennpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} to [[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]） – During the 【Ansei great earthquake】 (安政の大Earthquake / {{ill|Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja|安政南海Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), a massive tsunami caused 80,000 households to be swept away with over 3,000 fatalities. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]） – [[:en:Yoshida Shōin|Yoshida Shōin]] opened the [[:en:Shōkasonjuku Academy|Matsushita Sonjuku]].
== Births == * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1432|1432]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Shimazu Tadatoki|ja|島津立久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Tadatoki|1=Shimazu Tatsuhisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11245262}}, a regional warlord (守護大名) of the Shimazu clan (died [[:en:1474|1474]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – [[:en:Satake Yoshiharu|Satake Yoshiaki]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1758|1758]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]） – {{ill|Ii Naotaka|ja|井伊直暉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naotaka|1=Ii Naoteru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161312}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1826|1826]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Terutoku|ja|松平輝徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Terutoku|1=Matsudaira Teruakira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530597}}, a daimyō (died [[:en:1840|1840]]). * Bunsei 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1827|1827]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]） – [[:en:Saisho Atsushi|Zeisho Atsu]], a samurai and bureaucrat (died [[:en:1910|1910]]). * Bunsei 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]） – [[:en:Sakakibara Kenkichi|Sakakibara Kanekichi]], a retainer (幕臣) and practitioner of [[:en:Kenjutsu|Kenjutsu]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]） – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]） – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]） – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]） – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|4|11|6|10|5|12|11|1105|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初五]][[zh:十一月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初五]][[zh:十一月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初五]][[zh:十一月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840230]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 5|qq=November 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 16th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|797|en|797|WD=Q31902|lt=797}} {{ill|November 27|en|November 27|WD=Q3018|lt=November 27}}） – {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|WD=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} was appointed as {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} for the subjugation of the Ezo lands. * {{ill|Bunryaku|en|Bunryaku|WD=Q1194125|lt=Bunryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1234|en|1234|WD=Q5424|lt=1234}} {{ill|November (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} to {{ill|Bunryaku|en|Bunryaku|WD=Q1194125|lt=Bunryaku}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24}}） – During the 【Ansei great earthquake】 (安政の大Earthquake / {{ill|Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja|安政南海Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), a massive tsunami caused 80,000 households to be swept away with over 3,000 fatalities. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857}} {{Not to be confused with|November 5|qq=November 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 16th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|797|en|797|WD=Q31902|lt=797|1=797}} {{ill|November 27|en|November 27|WD=Q3018|lt=November 27|1=November 27}}） – {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|WD=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|1=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} was appointed as {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} for the subjugation of the Ezo lands. * {{ill|Bunryaku|en|Bunryaku|WD=Q1194125|lt=Bunryaku|1=Bunryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1234|en|1234|WD=Q5424|lt=1234|1=1234}} {{ill|November 27|en|November 27|WD=Q3018|lt=November 27|1=November 27}}） – Due to a celestial earthquake, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tennpuku (Japan)|ja|天福|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennpuku (Japan)|1=Q1305722|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} to {{ill|Bunryaku|en|Bunryaku|WD=Q1194125|lt=Bunryaku|1=Bunryaku}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24|1=December 24}}） – During the 【Ansei great earthquake】 (安政の大Earthquake / {{ill|Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja|安政南海Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei Nankai Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), a massive tsunami caused 80,000 households to be swept away with over 3,000 fatalities. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20|1=December 20}}） – {{ill|Yoshida Shōin|en|Yoshida Shōin|WD=Q559747|lt=Yoshida Shōin|1=Yoshida Shōin}} opened the {{ill|Shōkasonjuku Academy|en|Shōkasonjuku Academy|WD=Q2326743|lt=Matsushita Sonjuku|1=Shōkasonjuku Academy}}.
